programme.title: 💨 3.6m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Lagide's got a 3.6m onshore slop today; you'll be fighting for scraps, or just fighting.
🌊 Swell: 3.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 22.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 38.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.1m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Significant wind chop

programme.title: 🌊 3.6m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a 3.6m swell and those winds, it'll be more like survival training than a proper bodyboarding session.
🌊 Swell: 3.6m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 3.6m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a 3.6m swell and those winds, it'll be more like survival training than a proper bodyboarding session.
🌊 Swell: 3.6m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 3.5m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
With those winds against a 3.5m swell, Supertubos will be serving up heavy closeouts with a side of backwash today.
🌊 Swell: 3.5m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 3.5m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 3.5m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 3.5m of Atlantic persuasion and a decent breeze, today offers a good chance to practice duck diving, repeatedly.
🌊 Swell: 3.5m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 3.5m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 3.5m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 3.5m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That onshore wind will turn those 3.5-meter waves into a washing machine; might be better to watch the fishing boats.
🌊 Swell: 3.5m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 3.5m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With a 3.5m swell and this wind, today's session will likely involve more paddling than riding at Cantinho.
🌊 Swell: 3.5m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 3.5m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Those 3.5m onshore closeouts will certainly separate the wheat from the chaff today.
🌊 Swell: 3.5m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 3.5m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that 3.5m onshore mess, today's Lagide is best viewed from the cafe, unless you enjoy white water beatings.
🌊 Swell: 3.5m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 17.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze and 2.8m swell, today's Meio da Baia will either be a triumph of persistence or a humbling shorebreak experience.
🌊 Swell: 2.8m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 15s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.8m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 15s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
2.8 meters with onshore wind? Today Lagide offers potential for fleeting moments of glory amidst the chaos.
🌊 Swell: 2.8m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m
📋 Long period - powerful waves
